## Security checklist

- [ ] No live secrets, real vault exports, production tokens, or real passkeys
      are included.
- [ ] Logs, errors, tests, and snapshots do not expose secret material.
- [ ] Security-model impact is documented for changes touching auth, crypto,
      local storage, agent behavior, or passkeys.
- [ ] Official references were followed or updated.
